steps.title: Identify the core goal
steps.content: The student wants to “contrast the number of haiku in each poem” — that is, show the difference between 15 and 7. This is the specific requirement the answer must fulfill.

steps.title: Find the choice that delivers the contrast
steps.content: Choice A directly states the numbers: “15 haiku... whereas... seven” — the word “whereas” creates the contrast. The other three choices address location, subjects, and themes instead. That matches choice A — A is correct.
